steps.title: Separate statement and reason
steps.content: The sentence first says a ray diagram reveals how the pinhole camera works. The following Because clause explains why the small hole creates a clear image, so it should begin a new explanatory sentence.

steps.title: Choose the clean break
steps.content: Choice A makes one long sentence that does not clearly separate the explanation. Choice C creates the awkward phrase it is because. Choice D uses a colon before the same awkward phrase. The period before Because is clean and grammatical. The answer is B.
